items.summary: Spotify is rolling out a new AI-powered conversational feature that lets Premium subscribers chat with the app to discover music, podcasts, audiobooks, and more.

items.summary: OpenAI has spent the better part of the year involved in lawsuit after lawsuit, including one from the world's richest man. items.title: Microsoft promised to be carbon negative. Its emissions just jumped 25%
items.summary: Microsoft promised to be carbon negative by 2030. Its own report shows emissions up 25% in a year instead. items.title: Superhuman’s new auto-draft feature almost makes me like AI replies
items.summary: Superhuman’s latest AI email drafting feature is its most convincing yet, generating replies that often required little to no editing in our testing.
